newsSince: Strongest signal in batch. Stock +18.55% since June 9 (+55.84% YTD). FY March-2027 revenue growth now expected to exceed 20% on AI/DRAM strength; Kokusai holds ~70% global batch-ALD share, a primary equipment supplier into SK Hynix M15X and Samsung P4 HBM4 lines ramping H2 2026. No single discrete press release, but the HBM4 ramp evidence has firmed materially.

sources.label: Kokusai 6525 Q1 FY2026 earnings call (Yahoo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: Page is a CPO lens — imperfect fit (Kokusai is batch-ALD wafer equipment, not co-packaged optics) — but its choke-point alpha firmed: FY3/27 growth now guided >20%, 70% ALD share feeding SK Hynix M15X + Samsung P4 HBM4 lines. Prior June 9 'hold' is overtaken by the HBM4 ramp; move up +3.
verdicts.bull: 70% batch-ALD monopoly into HBM4; FY3/27 revenue growth now >20%; SK Hynix/Samsung HBM4 lines mass-produce H2 2026 — purest HBM equipment play.
verdicts.neutral: Strong but partly priced after +56% YTD; not a true CPO/optics name on this page.
verdicts.bear: Single-bundle/validation risk; DRAM-capex cyclicality; rich move pulls forward HBM4 upside.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: SK Hynix M15X / Samsung P4 HBM4 ALD order ramp through H2 2026.
verdicts.primaryRisk: DRAM capex digestion or HBM4 line delays.
